---
title: "Causal Inference"
description: "DAGs, potential outcomes, DiD, IV, RDD, synthetic control."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker"><span data-topic-count="causal-inference"></span> TUTORIALS</div>
  <h1>Causal Inference</h1>
  <p class="lead">DAGs, potential outcomes, DiD, IV, RDD, synthetic control.</p>
</div>
```
